_meta.title: Accounting System — AI-Readable Specification
_meta.purpose: Machine-parseable schema for AI code generators, LLM agents, and no-code builders
instructions: entities[].fields[] → DB columns + form inputs + display components
entities[].ui_config → page layout, list view, detail view, create form
api[] → REST endpoints + React Query hooks
flows[] → ordered interaction sequences to implement
permissions → role-based rendering and API guard rules
design_system → Tailwind tokens to apply consistently
state_management → React Query keys + Zustand store shapes
generation_rules → hard constraints the AI must not violate

frontend.forms: React Hook Form v7 + Zod validation

org_id_injection.middleware: injectOrgId(req, res, next) sets req.orgId from verified JWT

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Please refresh and try again.

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally at middleware via Knex globalScope or Prisma middleware

standard_constraints: check constraints for enums (or use PG ENUM types)
unique where business logic requires it

global_fields.name: org_id
global_fields.api_exposure: db_only — set by middleware from JWT, never in request/response body

global_fields.name: updated_at
global_fields.description: Last update time, auto-updated via trigger

global_fields.name: version
global_fields.description: Optimistic lock counter. Starts at 1, incremented on every UPDATE.

entities.name: Account
entities.description: Chart of accounts. Every debit and credit in the ledger references an Account.

fields.name: org_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
fields.notes: Multi-tenant scoping. Injected server-side from JWT. Never accepted from client.

fields.name: subtype
fields.notes: Values depend on type. e.g. asset → current_asset, fixed_asset, other_asset

fields.name: parent_account_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES accounts(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
fields.notes: Enables account hierarchy. Null means top-level.

fields.name: current_balance
fields.notes: Computed from journal lines. Never edited directly.

fields.name: deleted_at
fields.notes: Soft delete.

indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_org_type ON accounts(org_id, type) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_accounts_org_code ON accounts(org_id, code) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_parent ON accounts(parent_account_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

domain_rules.rule: Inactive accounts cannot be selected in new transactions
domain_rules.api_guard: Filter is_active=true on all account selector endpoints. Reject FK references to inactive accounts.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: AccountSelector filters is_active=true. Show warning if existing transaction references deactivated account.

domain_rules.rule: Accounts with posted journal lines cannot be deleted, only deactivated
domain_rules.api_guard: Before DELETE, check journal_lines count for account_id. If > 0, return 409.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Delete button replaced with Deactivate for accounts with posted lines. Show tooltip explanation.
domain_rules.db_constraint: Application-level enforcement. No CASCADE DELETE on journal_lines.account_id FK.

domain_rules.rule: Account code must be unique within org
domain_rules.api_guard: Validate uniqueness of code within org_id before insert/update. Return 409 with field error.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show inline error on code field if duplicate detected.
domain_rules.db_constraint: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_accounts_org_code ON accounts(org_id, code) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

empty_state.heading: No accounts yet
empty_state.subtext: Set up your chart of accounts to start recording transactions.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON accounts USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: JournalEntry
entities.description: A double-entry bookkeeping record. Every financial event becomes a JournalEntry with balanced debit and credit lines.

fields.name: org_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
fields.notes: Multi-tenant scoping. Injected server-side from JWT. Never accepted from client.

fields.name: entry_number
fields.notes: Auto-generated: JE-YYYYMMDD-NNNN

fields.name: status
fields.notes: Status controlled by post/void actions only.

fields.name: total_debit
fields.notes: Computed from lines. Must equal total_credit before posting.

fields.name: created_by
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: deleted_at
fields.notes: Soft delete. Posted entries cannot be deleted, only voided.

domain_rules.rule: total_debit must equal total_credit before entry can be posted
domain_rules.api_guard: Before POST /journal-entries/:id/post, verify SUM(debit) == SUM(credit) for all lines. Return 422 if unbalanced.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Post button is disabled until total_debit equals total_credit. Show running balance indicator in line editor.

domain_rules.rule: Posted entries cannot be edited — they must be voided and re-entered
domain_rules.api_guard: PATCH /journal-entries/:id rejects if status == posted. Return 409.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Edit fields are read-only for posted entries. Show Void button instead of Edit.

domain_rules.rule: Entries in closed financial periods cannot be posted or voided
domain_rules.api_guard: On post or void, check FinancialPeriod.status for period_id. If closed or locked, return 422.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Post and Void buttons disabled for entries in closed periods. Show tooltip with period status.

domain_rules.rule: entry_number is auto-generated and unique within org
domain_rules.api_guard: Server generates entry_number on creation. Never accepted from client. Unique constraint on (org_id, entry_number).
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Entry number field is read-only and shown after save.
domain_rules.db_constraint: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_journal_entries_org_number ON journal_entries(org_id, entry_number)

empty_state.heading: No journal entries
empty_state.subtext: Journal entries record every financial transaction.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON journal_entries USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: JournalLine
entities.description: A single debit or credit line within a JournalEntry.

fields.name: org_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
fields.notes: Multi-tenant scoping. Injected server-side from JWT. Never accepted from client.

fields.name: journal_entry_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES journal_entries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

domain_rules.rule: A line must have either debit > 0 or credit > 0, not both
domain_rules.api_guard: Validate each line: exactly one of debit or credit must be > 0. Return 422 if both or neither are set.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: When debit is entered, credit field is cleared and disabled. When credit is entered, debit field is cleared and disabled.
domain_rules.db_constraint: CHECK ((debit > 0 AND credit = 0) OR (credit > 0 AND debit = 0))

domain_rules.rule: Lines belong to a JournalEntry and are deleted when entry is deleted
domain_rules.db_constraint: ON DELETE CASCADE on journal_lines.journal_entry_id FK

indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_journal_lines_journal_entry_account ON journal_lines(journal_entry_id, account_id)
entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON journal_lines USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: Invoice
entities.description: A request for payment sent to a Customer. Tracks amounts owed and payment status.

fields.name: org_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
fields.notes: Multi-tenant scoping. Injected server-side from JWT. Never accepted from client.

fields.name: invoice_number
fields.notes: Auto-generated: INV-YYYYMMDD-NNNN

fields.name: subtotal
fields.notes: Computed from lines.

validation.message: Total must be a positive number

fields.name: balance_due
fields.notes: total minus sum of applied payments.

fields.name: created_by
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

domain_rules.rule: total = subtotal + tax_total
domain_rules.api_guard: Recompute subtotal and tax_total on any line mutation. Persist total = subtotal + tax_total on invoice row.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show live computed total in form footer as lines are edited.

domain_rules.rule: balance_due = total - sum(applied_payments)
domain_rules.api_guard: Recompute balance_due after any payment is created, updated, or deleted for this invoice.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show balance_due prominently in invoice header. Update in real time after payment recorded.

domain_rules.rule: Voided invoices cannot receive payments
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /payments, check invoice status. If voided, return 422.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Record Payment button hidden for voided invoices. Show Voided badge.

domain_rules.rule: Paid invoices are read-only
domain_rules.api_guard: PATCH /invoices/:id rejects edits if status == paid. Return 409.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: All form fields are disabled for paid invoices. Show read-only indicator.

domain_rules.rule: Invoice number is auto-generated and unique within org
domain_rules.api_guard: Server generates invoice_number on creation. Never accepted from client.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Invoice number is read-only and shown after save.
domain_rules.db_constraint: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_invoices_org_number ON invoices(org_id, invoice_number)

empty_state.heading: No invoices yet
empty_state.subtext: Create your first invoice to start billing customers.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON invoices USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

fields.name: invoice_id

fields.name: line_total
fields.notes: Computed: quantity * unit_price

fields.name: tax_rate_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES tax_rates(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON invoice_lines USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: Bill
entities.description: A payable document received from a Vendor. The accounts-payable counterpart to an Invoice.

fields.name: org_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
fields.notes: Multi-tenant scoping. Injected server-side from JWT. Never accepted from client.

fields.name: bill_number

validation.message: Total must be a positive number

fields.name: created_by
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

domain_rules.rule: total = subtotal + tax_total
domain_rules.api_guard: Recompute subtotal and tax_total on any line mutation. Persist total = subtotal + tax_total on bill row.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show live computed total in form footer as lines are edited.

domain_rules.rule: balance_due = total - sum(applied_payments)
domain_rules.api_guard: Recompute balance_due after any payment is created, updated, or deleted for this bill.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show balance_due in bill header. Update after payment recorded.

domain_rules.rule: Bills require approval before payment in some orgs
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /payments for a bill, check bill status. If org.require_bill_approval=true and status != approved, return 422.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Record Payment button disabled for unapproved bills when approval is required. Show Approve button for eligible roles.

domain_rules.rule: Voided bills cannot receive payments
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /payments, check bill status. If voided, return 422.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Record Payment button hidden for voided bills.

empty_state.heading: No bills yet
empty_state.subtext: Add bills to track what you owe vendors.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON bills USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: Payment
entities.description: Records money received from a Customer or paid to a Vendor. Applied to Invoices or Bills.

fields.name: org_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
fields.notes: Multi-tenant scoping. Injected server-side from JWT. Never accepted from client.

fields.name: payment_number
fields.notes: Auto-generated: PMT-YYYYMMDD-NNNN

fields.name: customer_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES customers(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: vendor_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES vendors(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: invoice_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES invoices(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: bill_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES bills(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: bank_account_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES bank_accounts(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

fields.name: created_by
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

domain_rules.rule: Payment amount cannot exceed open balance of linked invoice or bill unless explicitly allowed
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /payments, compare amount to invoice.balance_due or bill.balance_due. If amount > balance_due and org.allow_overpayment=false, return 422.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Amount field shows remaining balance as a hint. Show warning if entered amount exceeds balance.

domain_rules.rule: Inbound payments must link to a customer_id
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /payments with direction=inbound, require customer_id. Return 422 if missing.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Customer field is required and highlighted when direction=inbound. Vendor field hidden.

domain_rules.rule: Outbound payments must link to a vendor_id
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /payments with direction=outbound, require vendor_id. Return 422 if missing.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Vendor field is required and highlighted when direction=outbound. Customer field hidden.

domain_rules.rule: Applying a payment updates balance_due on the linked invoice or bill
domain_rules.api_guard: After payment creation, recompute and persist balance_due on linked invoice or bill. Update status to partial or paid accordingly.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Invoice/bill balance_due updates after payment is recorded. Status badge refreshes.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON payments USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

fields.description: Last 4 digits of bank account number

entities.name: BankTransaction

fields.name: org_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
fields.notes: Multi-tenant scoping. Injected server-side from JWT. Never accepted from client.

fields.name: bank_account_id
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES bank_accounts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

validation.message: Amount must be a positive number

fields.name: matched_entity_type
fields.notes: e.g. 'payment', 'expense', 'journal_entry'

db_constraints.name: bank_transactions_matched_entity_id_fkey
db_constraints.note: matched_entity_id is polymorphic — it references different tables depending on entity_type. No DB-level FK enforced. Referential integrity handled in app layer.

entities.name: ReconciliationSession
entities.description: A reconciliation workflow that matches bank statement transactions to book entries.

fields.name: org_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
fields.notes: Multi-tenant scoping. Injected server-side from JWT. Never accepted from client.

fields.name: book_ending_balance
fields.notes: Computed from cleared transactions.

fields.name: difference
fields.notes: statement_ending_balance - book_ending_balance. Must be 0 to complete.

fields.name: completed_by
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

domain_rules.rule: difference must equal 0 before session can be completed
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /reconciliation-sessions/:id/complete, check difference == 0. Return 422 if non-zero.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Complete button disabled until difference field shows 0. Show difference prominently with color coding (red if non-zero, green if zero).

domain_rules.rule: Completed sessions are read-only
domain_rules.api_guard: PATCH /reconciliation-sessions/:id rejects if status == completed. Return 409.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: All session fields and transaction matching controls are disabled for completed sessions.

domain_rules.rule: Only one in_progress session per bank_account at a time
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /reconciliation-sessions, check for existing in_progress session for bank_account_id. Return 409 if found.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show in-progress session link instead of New Session button when one exists.
domain_rules.db_constraint: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_recon_sessions_active ON reconciliation_sessions(bank_account_id) WHERE status = 'in_progress'

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON reconciliation_sessions USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: FinancialPeriod
entities.description: An accounting period (month, quarter, year). Closed periods are locked from further entries.

fields.name: org_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
fields.notes: Multi-tenant scoping. Injected server-side from JWT. Never accepted from client.

fields.name: closed_by
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

domain_rules.rule: Closed and locked periods are read-only — no new entries may be posted
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /journal-entries/:id/post or void, check period_id's FinancialPeriod.status. If closed or locked, return 422.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Period badge shows closed/locked state. New entry creation warns when selecting a closed period.

domain_rules.rule: Closing a period triggers validation that no pending draft entries exist for that period
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /financial-periods/:id/close, count journal_entries with status=draft and period_id=:id. If > 0, return 422 with list of draft entries.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Close Period button shows pre-flight checklist. Lists unposted entries that must be resolved.

domain_rules.rule: Period dates cannot overlap with other periods in the same org
domain_rules.api_guard: On CREATE/UPDATE, check for date range overlap within org_id. Return 409 with conflicting period name.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show inline error on date fields if overlap detected.
domain_rules.db_constraint: Application-level check: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM financial_periods WHERE org_id=:org_id AND id!=:id AND start_date <= :end_date AND end_date >= :start_date

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON financial_periods USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: Organization
entities.description: The tenant organization. Single row per tenant. Root of all multi-tenancy scoping. Referenced by org_id on every other table.

fields.name: slug
fields.notes: URL-safe identifier. Auto-generated from name. Immutable after creation.

fields.name: currency
fields.notes: Base/functional currency for the org. All reporting in this currency.

fields.name: fiscal_year_start_month
fields.db_type: INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (fiscal_year_start_month BETWEEN 1 AND 12)
fields.notes: 1=January, 12=December. Drives financial period auto-generation.

fields.name: allow_overpayment
fields.notes: If true, payments may exceed invoice/bill balance_due.

indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_organizations_slug ON organizations(slug)
entities.rls_policy: NONE — organizations table uses application-level auth. RLS not applied; each row IS a tenant.

entities.name: PaymentApplication
entities.description: Records how a payment amount is allocated across one or more invoices or bills. Enables partial and split payments. One Payment may have many PaymentApplications.

fields.name: org_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
fields.notes: Multi-tenant scoping. Injected server-side from JWT. Never accepted from client.

fields.name: payment_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES payments(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

fields.name: entity_id
fields.notes: References invoices(id) when entity_type='invoice', bills(id) when entity_type='bill'. Polymorphic — no DB-level FK.

fields.name: amount_applied
fields.notes: Must be > 0. Sum of all applications for a payment cannot exceed payment.amount.

validation.message: Amount must be a positive number

indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_payment_applications_entity ON payment_applications(entity_type, entity_id)

db_constraints.name: payment_applications_entity_id_fkey
db_constraints.note: entity_id is polymorphic. References invoices(id) or bills(id) based on entity_type. No DB-level FK — enforced in application layer.

domain_rules.rule: Sum of applications cannot exceed payment amount
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /payment-applications, sum existing amount_applied for payment_id plus new amount_applied must not exceed payment.amount. Return 422 if exceeded.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Amount input pre-filled with remaining unapplied balance. Cannot exceed it.

domain_rules.rule: Cannot apply to voided documents
domain_rules.api_guard: On POST /payment-applications, check entity status. Return 422 if invoice/bill is voided or written_off.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Voided invoices/bills excluded from entity selector.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON payment_applications USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: ReconciliationMatch
entities.description: A confirmed or proposed match between a bank transaction and an accounting record (payment, expense, or journal entry). Created during reconciliation. One bank transaction can have at most one confirmed match.

fields.name: org_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
fields.notes: Multi-tenant scoping. Injected server-side from JWT. Never accepted from client.

fields.name: session_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES reconciliation_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

fields.name: bank_transaction_id
fields.db_type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES bank_transactions(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

fields.name: matched_entity_type
fields.notes: Discriminator for polymorphic matched_entity_id.

fields.name: matched_entity_id
fields.notes: References payments(id), expenses(id), or journal_entries(id) based on matched_entity_type.

fields.name: confidence_score
fields.notes: 0.000–1.000. Populated by matching engine for auto_suggested and rule_based matches. NULL for manual.

fields.name: matched_by
fields.db_type: UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_reconciliation_matches_confirmed_unique ON reconciliation_matches(bank_transaction_id) WHERE status = 'confirmed'

db_constraints.name: reconciliation_matches_entity_id_fkey
db_constraints.note: matched_entity_id is polymorphic. References payments, expenses, or journal_entries based on matched_entity_type. No DB-level FK.

db_constraints.name: reconciliation_matches_one_confirmed_per_tx
db_constraints.notes: Partial unique index (WHERE status='confirmed'). Only one confirmed match per bank transaction allowed.

domain_rules.rule: One confirmed match per bank transaction
domain_rules.api_guard: On PATCH /reconciliation-matches/:id to status=confirmed, check no other confirmed match exists for bank_transaction_id. Return 409 if duplicate.
domain_rules.db_constraint: Partial unique index on (bank_transaction_id) WHERE status='confirmed'.

domain_rules.rule: Confirming a match updates BankTransaction.reconciliation_status
domain_rules.api_guard: On PATCH confirming a match: set bank_transaction.reconciliation_status='matched'. On PATCH rejecting: if no other confirmed match, set bank_transaction.reconciliation_status='unmatched'.

entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON reconciliation_matches USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

external_entity_refs.name: FinancialPeriod

props.rowActions: RowAction<T>[]  // optional per-row action menu items

shared.notes: Never fetches data. Pure display component. Caller is responsible for data fetching.

shared.name: SlideOverForm

props.title: string

states: open-dirty — close button shows confirm dialog

shared.name: StatusBadge
shared.description: Colored badge for status enum values. Color map read from src/constants/statusColors.ts — never hardcoded.

props.entity: string  // entity name used to look up color map e.g. 'invoice', 'bill', 'journal_entry'

shared.notes: NEVER accept a color prop directly. Always look up from statusColors constant.

shared.name: CurrencyDisplay
shared.description: Formats a number as currency using Intl.NumberFormat with org's currency setting. Right-aligned, tabular-nums font.

props.currency: string  // ISO 4217 code e.g. 'USD'. Defaults to org currency from authStore.
props.showSign: boolean  // prepend + or - based on value. Default false.

shared.name: AccountSelector
shared.description: Searchable select for choosing an account. Filters out inactive accounts. Supports account_type filter to restrict to e.g. only expense accounts.

props.account_type: AccountType | AccountType[] | undefined  // restrict to specific types

shared.notes: NEVER show inactive accounts. Always filter is_active=true.

shared.name: CustomerSearchSelect
shared.description: Async search select for customers. Debounced search against GET /customers?q=.
shared.data_source: useCustomers({ q: searchTerm, is_active: true, limit: 20 })

shared.name: VendorSearchSelect
shared.description: Async search select for vendors.
shared.data_source: useVendors({ q: searchTerm, is_active: true, limit: 20 })

shared.name: PeriodSelect
shared.description: Select for financial periods. Shows only open periods by default. Closed periods shown with locked badge.

shared.name: TaxRateSelect
shared.description: Select for active tax rates. Shows percentage alongside name.

shared.name: JournalLinesEditor
shared.description: Editable grid for journal entry lines. Shows running total_debit and total_credit. Shows imbalance warning if not equal. Supports drag-to-reorder. Adds/removes rows dynamically.

props.disabled: boolean  // true when entry is posted or voided

shared.behavior: Computes total_debit and total_credit on every change. Shows BalanceIndicator component. Disables Post button if unbalanced.
shared.notes: This is the critical domain-specific component. The imbalance warning uses design_system.accounting_specific.reconciliation_difference_nonzero styling.

shared.name: InvoiceLinesEditor
shared.description: Editable grid for invoice line items. Computes line_total = quantity * unit_price on every change. Shows running subtotal, tax_total, and total at bottom.
shared.behavior: Per-line: line_total = quantity * unit_price. Footer: subtotal = sum(line_total). tax_total = sum(line * tax_rate.percentage / 100). total = subtotal + tax_total. All computed client-side in real-time.

shared.name: BillLinesEditor
shared.description: Editable grid for bill line items. Same behavior as InvoiceLinesEditor but uses unit_cost and expense_account_id.

shared.name: BalanceIndicator
shared.description: Shows total_debit, total_credit, and difference for a journal entry in real-time. Uses red+pulse styling when unbalanced, green when balanced.
shared.behavior: difference = total_debit - total_credit. If difference != 0: render with design_system.accounting_specific.reconciliation_difference_nonzero class. If difference == 0: render with reconciliation_difference_zero class.

shared.name: ReconciliationWorkspace
shared.description: Full reconciliation UI. Two-column layout: transaction list (left) and summary panel (right). Reads/writes reconciliationStore.
shared.behavior: Loads transactions via useBankTransactions. Syncs clearedTransactionIds to reconciliationStore. Recomputes difference on every checkbox change. Enables Complete button only when isComplete=true in store.

shared.name: ReconciliationDifference
shared.description: Displays reconciliation difference. Green + 'Balanced' when 0. Red + pulsing when non-zero.

shared.name: EmptyState
shared.description: Empty state display for lists and tables.

shared.name: LoadingSkeleton
shared.description: Animated skeleton placeholder shown while data loads. Variant determines shape.

shared.name: ActivityTimeline
shared.description: Chronological list of audit log events for a specific entity.

shared.name: ConfirmationDialog
shared.description: Modal confirmation dialog for destructive actions. Reads from uiStore.confirmDialog.

shared.name: NotificationBell
shared.description: Bell icon in top navbar showing unread count badge. Opens notification dropdown on click.
shared.data_source: useNotificationCount() for badge, useNotifications() for dropdown list
shared.behavior: Badge shows count from useNotificationCount. Badge animates on new ws notification.new event. Dropdown marks items read via useMarkNotifRead on click.

shared.name: StatCard
shared.description: KPI card for dashboard. Shows label, formatted value, icon, and optional link.

shared.name: FilterPanel
shared.description: Collapsible filter panel above list pages. Renders filter controls based on entities[].ui_config.list_view.filters. Syncs state to filterStore and URL.

shared.name: PageHeader
shared.description: Page title, breadcrumb, and primary/secondary action buttons.

props.title: string
props.breadcrumbs: Array<{ label: string, href: string | undefined }>
props.primary_action: { label: string, onClick: () => void, disabled?: boolean } | undefined
props.secondary_actions: Array<{ label: string, onClick: () => void, icon?: string }>

shared.name: TabPanel
shared.description: Tabbed navigation for detail pages. Tab state synced to URL query param 'tab'. Lazy-loads non-eager tabs.

props.tabs: Array<{ name: string, component: React.ReactNode, eager: boolean }>

shared.name: ReportChart
shared.description: Recharts wrapper for rendering report data as bar, line, or combined chart.

props.y_keys: Array<{ key: string, label: string, color: string }>

shared.name: AuthGuard

props.required_permission: string | undefined  // permission key from permissions.matrix

shared.behavior: On mount: validate token via authStore.is_authenticated. If required_permission set: check permissions map via roleGuard(). On failure: redirect as appropriate.

shared.name: YesNoBadge
shared.description: Green badge for true, red/gray badge for false.

shared.name: AbsoluteDate
shared.description: Displays an ISO date or timestamp as a localized absolute date string. Uses date-fns format.

shared.name: RelativeDate
shared.description: Displays an ISO timestamp as relative time (e.g. '3 hours ago'). Shows absolute date on hover via tooltip.

shared.name: AttachmentPreview
shared.description: Shows attachment icon with filename. Opens preview modal for images and PDFs.

shared.name: ReceiptUploader
shared.description: File upload button for receipts. Uploads via POST /attachments and returns attachment_id. Shows upload progress.

shared.name: TextInput
shared.description: Standard single-line text input. Renders label, input, and error message. Applies dark theme styles from design_system.

props.name: string  // React Hook Form field name

shared.name: Textarea
shared.description: Multi-line text input. Same registration pattern as TextInput.

props.name: string
props.label: string
props.currency: string  // ISO 4217. Default from org settings in authStore.

shared.name: NumberInput
shared.description: Numeric input for non-currency numbers (e.g. quantity, percentage). Stores number in form state.

props.name: string
props.label: string
props.options: Array<{ value: string, label: string, disabled?: boolean }>

shared.name: Toggle

props.name: string
props.label: string
props.description: string | undefined  // helper text shown below label

shared.name: EmailInput
shared.description: Text input with type=email and email format validation. Shows inline error on blur.

props.label: string

shared.name: BillSearchSelect

shared.name: PlainText
shared.description: Renders a plain string value with standard body typography. Returns em-dash for null/empty values.

props.href: string  // route with :id substituted by caller

shared.name: MonospaceText
shared.description: Renders a value in monospace font. Used for codes (account codes, invoice numbers, reference IDs).

shared.name: TruncatedText

shared.name: CopyableText
shared.description: Renders text with a copy-to-clipboard icon on hover. Shows toast confirmation on copy. Used for email and phone fields.

shared.name: NumberDisplay
shared.description: Renders a number with locale formatting. Used for quantity fields. Not for currency.

shared.name: PercentageDisplay

variants.UserAvatar+name: show_name=true — avatar icon alongside first_name + last_name. The string 'UserAvatar+name' in display_component means render <UserAvatar show_name={true} />

shared.name: AddressBlock
shared.description: Renders an IAddress JSONB object as a formatted multi-line address block.

shared.name: MaskedAccountNumber

shared.name: DownloadLink

shared.name: FileTypeIcon
shared.description: Shows appropriate Lucide icon based on MIME type. PDF → FileText, image → Image, spreadsheet → Table, other → File.

shared.name: FileSizeDisplay
shared.description: Formats file size in bytes to human-readable string (KB, MB).

shared.name: BarChart

shared.accessibility: aria-label on SVG; keyboard-navigable via Recharts defaults

shared.name: LineChart

props.lines: Array<{ dataKey: string; color: string; label: string; dashed?: boolean }>

shared.accessibility: aria-label on SVG; tooltip on hover

shared.name: DonutChart

props.data: Array<{ name: string; value: number; color?: string }>

shared.accessibility: aria-label; each segment has title element
shared.notes: Auto-assign colors from design_system.badge_color_tokens when not provided.

shared.name: Skeleton
shared.description: Animated loading placeholder for a single line of content.
shared.notes: Uses CSS animate-pulse. Background: var(--bg-surface-2).

shared.name: SkeletonTable
shared.description: Full table skeleton matching DataTable layout — used as suspense fallback on list pages.
shared.notes: Column widths stagger for natural appearance. Reuse Skeleton internally.

shared.name: SkeletonCard
shared.description: Card-shaped skeleton for dashboard stat cards and detail panels.
shared.notes: Used in Dashboard StatCard placeholders.

shared.name: ConfirmDialog
shared.description: Radix Dialog-based confirmation modal for destructive or irreversible actions (delete, void, post).
shared.keyboard_nav: Esc closes; Enter confirms; Tab cycles between buttons
shared.accessibility: aria-modal; focus-trapped; focus returns to trigger on close
shared.notes: variant='danger' renders confirm button with bg-[var(--danger)]. Always show consequences in description.

shared.name: Toast

shared.keyboard_nav: F6 focuses toast region; Esc dismisses focused toast
shared.accessibility: role='status' for success/info; role='alert' for error/warning
shared.notes: Rendered in ToastViewport fixed to bottom-right. Max 3 visible at once — queue remainder.

shared.name: CommandPalette
shared.description: Global command palette (⌘K / Ctrl+K) for quick navigation, entity creation, and search using cmdk.
sections: Recent records (last 5 visited per entity type from localStorage)
Quick create (entities where user has .create permission)
Actions (context-sensitive: void, post, send based on current page)
shared.keyboard_nav: ⌘K / Ctrl+K opens; arrow keys navigate; Enter executes; Esc closes
shared.notes: Filter results in real-time. Show entity type icon beside each result. Integrated with GlobalSearchDialog for full search.

shared.name: DateRangePicker
shared.description: Two-calendar date range selector with presets (Today, This Week, This Month, This Quarter, Last Month, YTD, Custom).

props.value: { from: Date | null; to: Date | null }

shared.keyboard_nav: Tab navigates calendars; arrow keys move date focus; Enter selects
shared.accessibility: aria-label on trigger; each date cell has aria-label with full date
shared.notes: Uses react-day-picker. Store serialized as ISO strings in URL state.

shared.name: PercentInput

input_components.name: CurrencyInput

input_components.name: AmountInput

input_components.name: DatePicker

input_components.name: DateRangePicker
input_components.description: Two linked DatePickers for start/end date. Used in report parameters and filter panels. Ensures start <= end.

input_components.name: Select
input_components.description: Generic Radix UI Select wrapper. Used for any fixed enum field (status, type, role, direction).

input_components.name: Toggle
input_components.description: Radix UI Switch for boolean fields. Used for is_active, allow_overpayment, etc.

input_components.name: SearchInput

input_components.name: TextArea

page_components.name: AuditLogPage

page_components.name: CustomerDetailPage
page_components.description: Customer profile with tabs: Overview (address, contact, payment terms, AR balance summary), Invoices (linked invoices DataTable), Payments (received payments), Activity (audit log for this customer).

layout_components.name: AppShell
layout_components.description: Root authenticated layout. Renders Sidebar + Header + main content area. Reads uiStore.sidebarCollapsed for sidebar width (260px vs 64px). Wraps all authenticated routes.

layout_components.name: Sidebar
layout_components.description: Vertical nav. Renders modules[] filtered by user role. Active route highlighted. Collapse toggle persisted in localStorage via uiStore. Notification badge count from wsStore.unreadCount.

layout_components.name: Header
layout_components.description: Top bar. Shows current page title, org name, user avatar + dropdown (profile, logout). Mobile hamburger menu.

layout_components.name: AuthGuard
layout_components.description: Wraps all authenticated routes. Checks authStore.isAuthenticated. If false, redirects to /login with returnUrl. Also checks route permission against authStore.user.role.

layout_components.name: PageHeader
layout_components.description: Standard page title block. Props: title, subtitle, primaryAction, secondaryActions. Renders breadcrumb on detail pages.

layout_components.name: DetailLayout
layout_components.description: Two-column detail layout. Left: main content (60%). Right: sidebar with metadata, attachments, audit log (40%). Collapses to single column on mobile.

layout_components.name: TabLayout
layout_components.description: Radix UI Tabs wrapper. Syncs active tab with URL ?tab= param for deep-linking and back-navigation.

layout_components.name: SlideOver
layout_components.description: Radix UI Dialog displayed as right-side panel (max-w-xl). Used for create/edit forms to avoid full page navigation. Traps focus, closes on Escape or outside click. Dirty-state prompt before close.

layout_components.name: ConfirmDialog
layout_components.description: Radix UI AlertDialog for destructive confirmations. Props: title, message, confirmLabel (default 'Confirm'), onConfirm, loading. Shows spinner on confirm during mutation.

layout_components.name: ErrorBoundary
layout_components.description: React error boundary wrapping each route. Catches render errors and shows fallback with Retry button. Reports to Sentry if configured.

form_patterns.description: Standard patterns for all form implementations in the application.

standard_layout.required_indicator: * appended to label, aria-required=true on input

validation_strategy.mode: onBlur for initial validation, onChange after first submit attempt
validation_strategy.error_display: field-level: below input in text-[var(--danger)] text-xs; form-level: Alert component above submit

submit_pattern.loading_state: Disable all inputs + show spinner in submit button label
submit_pattern.success_state: Show toast success, navigate or close modal, invalidate relevant query keys
submit_pattern.error_state: Show toast error, keep form open, highlight errored fields from server response
submit_pattern.optimistic_update: Apply to cache before mutation settles; roll back on error

dirty_state.guard: Show ConfirmDialog if user navigates away from a dirty form (useBeforeUnload)
dirty_state.indicator: None — do not show visual dirty indicators to avoid noise

line_item_pattern.add_row: Button at bottom of table: '+ Add Line'
line_item_pattern.remove_row: Trash icon in last column; min 1 row enforced
line_item_pattern.reorder: Drag handle in first column (optional, not required for V1)
line_item_pattern.totals_row: Sticky row at bottom of line table showing subtotal, tax, total

empty_state_patterns.description: Standardized empty state component usage rules.

no_data.when: Entity list is empty (0 records, no active filters)
show: primary CTA if user has .create permission

no_results.when: Filtered or searched list returns 0 results

no_permission.when: User lacks view permission for a module
show: Contact admin message — never leak data about what exists

error.when: API query fails with non-401 error

empty_state_patterns.placement: Centered in the content area, min-height 300px, vertically centered with flexbox

loading_patterns.description: Standardized loading state rules for every data-fetching surface.
rules: List pages: render SkeletonTable with same column count as final table during initial load
Detail pages: render SkeletonCard for header area + SkeletonTable for line items during load
Dashboard stat cards: render SkeletonCard (lines=2) per card
Mutations (create/update/delete): disable submit button + show spinner inside button; never show full-page loader
Background refetches (stale data): do NOT show loading state — show stale data + subtle spinner in top-right of section
Chart components: show Skeleton rectangle of same height while data loads
Never use full-page spinner or overlay for data refetching — only for initial page load

suspense_boundaries.component_level: Heavy components (charts, tables >100 rows) get own boundary
suspense_boundaries.error_boundary: Paired with each Suspense — catches thrown errors and renders EmptyState variant='error'

animation_patterns.description: Motion guidelines for the application — prefer subtle, functional animations.
principles: Duration: 150ms for micro-interactions (hover, focus), 250ms for UI transitions (modal open), 350ms for page transitions
Easing: ease-out for elements entering view, ease-in for elements leaving
Respect prefers-reduced-motion: all animations must be disabled or reduced when OS setting is active
Never animate financial amounts directly — only reveal/fade containers

component_defaults.Modal: zoom-in on open, fade-out on close
component_defaults.SlideOver: slide-in-from-right on open, slide-out-to-right on close
component_defaults.Toast: slide-in-from-bottom on enter, fade-out on leave

refresh_token.rotation: true — new refresh token issued on every use, old one invalidated

auth.hydration: On app mount call GET /api/auth/me — if 200 populate authStore, if 401 redirect to /login
auth.interceptor: Axios request interceptor attaches Bearer token from memory. Response interceptor catches 401, calls refresh, retries once, then redirects to /login if refresh also fails.
auth.403_behavior: Show PermissionDenied component in-place — do not redirect
auth.token_refresh_lock: Single in-flight refresh promise shared across all queued requests via promiseRef to prevent parallel refresh races

409.ui: Conflict modal or inline error — e.g. unbalanced journal entry, closed period

payment_applications.purpose: List all applications for a payment
payment_applications.description: Return all PaymentApplication records for a given payment, with applied entity details.

payment_applications.purpose: Apply payment amount to an invoice or bill
payment_applications.description: Allocate a portion of a payment to a specific invoice or bill. Updates the entity's balance_due. Sum of all applications cannot exceed payment.amount.
payment_applications.request_schema: z.object({ payment_id: z.string().uuid(), entity_type: PaymentApplicationEntityTypeEnum, entity_id: z.string().uuid(), amount_applied: z.number().positive() })

error_cases.422_overapply: amount_applied would exceed payment.amount minus already-applied amounts
error_cases.422_voided: Target invoice or bill is voided — cannot apply payment
error_cases.422_paid: Target invoice or bill is already fully paid

payment_applications.purpose: Remove a payment application and restore balance_due
payment_applications.description: Delete a PaymentApplication. Recomputes the linked invoice/bill balance_due and status. Blocked if the parent payment is deleted.

reconciliation_matches.purpose: List all matches for a reconciliation session
reconciliation_matches.description: Return all ReconciliationMatch records for a session. Includes bank transaction and matched entity details. Supports status filter.

reconciliation_matches.purpose: Create a manual match between a bank transaction and an accounting record
reconciliation_matches.description: Manually match a bank transaction to a payment, expense, or journal entry. Sets match_type='manual', status='confirmed'. Updates bank_transaction.reconciliation_status to 'matched'.
reconciliation_matches.request_schema: z.object({ bank_transaction_id: z.string().uuid(), matched_entity_type: z.enum(['payment','expense','journal_entry','bank_fee']), matched_entity_id: z.string().uuid() })

error_cases.409: Bank transaction already has a confirmed match
error_cases.422_session: Session is locked or completed — no new matches allowed
error_cases.422_entity: matched_entity_id not found or belongs to different org

reconciliation_matches.purpose: Confirm or reject a suggested match
reconciliation_matches.description: Update match status to 'confirmed' or 'rejected'. Confirming sets bank_transaction.reconciliation_status='matched'. Rejecting reverts it to 'unmatched' if no other confirmed match exists.

error_cases.409: Another confirmed match already exists for this bank transaction
error_cases.422: Session is locked — matches cannot be updated

reconciliation_matches.purpose: Remove a match and revert bank transaction status
reconciliation_matches.description: Delete a reconciliation match. If match was confirmed, reverts bank_transaction.reconciliation_status to 'unmatched'. Blocked on locked sessions.

error_cases.422: Session is locked — cannot delete matches

error_cases.403: Cannot change own role or deactivate self

users.description: Sets user.status='inactive' and user.deleted_at. Does not delete data. Cannot deactivate self.

pagination_contract.description: Standard pagination parameters and response structure for all list endpoints.

cursor.description: Cursor for cursor-based pagination (used by audit_log and bank_transactions for large datasets)

pagination_contract.implementation_note: Use OFFSET/LIMIT for standard pagination. Use keyset pagination (WHERE id > cursor ORDER BY id) for audit_log and bank_transactions tables exceeding 1M rows.
pagination_contract.react_query_pattern: useInfiniteQuery for infinite scroll surfaces; useQuery with page param for standard paginated tables
pagination_contract.canonical_param_name: page_size (NOT limit, NOT per_page — those were deprecated names; all schemas now use page_size consistently)

sorting_contract.description: Standard sorting parameters accepted by all list endpoints.

sort.description: Field name to sort by — must be a whitelisted sortable column per endpoint

sorting_contract.security_note: Validate sort field against whitelist server-side. Reject unrecognised sort fields with 400.

filtering_contract.description: Standard filter parameters accepted by list endpoints. All filters are AND-combined.

search.description: Full-text search across entity name/reference fields

from_date.description: ISO 8601 date — filter records where primary date field >= from_date

to_date.description: ISO 8601 date — filter records where primary date field <= to_date

is_active.description: Filter by is_active flag (accounts, customers, vendors, tax_rates)

deleted.description: When true, include soft-deleted records (admin only)

filtering_contract.implementation_note: All filter params are optional. Empty string ignores filter. Boolean params accept '1'/'0' or 'true'/'false'. Sanitise all inputs against SQL injection.
filtering_contract.security_note: All filters are scoped to org_id from JWT — users can never query across org boundaries.

file_upload_contract.description: Standard two-step file upload flow for all attachment endpoints.

flow.action: Client PUTs file bytes directly to upload_url

file_upload_contract.url_expiry: Presigned GET URLs for downloads expire after 60 minutes. Re-request via GET /api/attachments/:id/download-url.
file_upload_contract.virus_scan: Files queued for async virus scan after step 3. Status transitions: pending → scanning → clean | quarantined.
file_upload_contract.implementation_note: Never pass file bytes through the application server — always use presigned URLs.

webhook_events.description: Outbound webhook delivery for external integrations. Configured per-org via Settings > Integrations.
webhook_events.delivery_model: At-least-once delivery with exponential backoff retries (1m, 5m, 30m, 2h, 8h). Mark failed after 5 attempts.
webhook_events.signature: HMAC-SHA256 of raw request body using org webhook secret. Header: X-Signature-256: sha256=<hex>

payload_envelope.data: object (entity snapshot — same as GET /:id response)

error_handling_patterns.description: Standard API error handling patterns — frontend and backend.

http_status_usage.400: Validation error (Zod schema failure) — body contains field-level errors
http_status_usage.401: Missing or expired JWT — client must refresh token or redirect to login
http_status_usage.403: Valid JWT but insufficient permission — show 403 page
http_status_usage.404: Resource not found or deleted (treat both the same to prevent enumeration)
http_status_usage.409: Conflict — e.g. journal entry already posted, period already locked
http_status_usage.422: Business rule violation — e.g. journal entry does not balance
http_status_usage.429: Rate limit exceeded — Retry-After header present
http_status_usage.500: Unexpected server error — log server-side, return generic message to client

frontend_handling.401: Intercept in axios/fetch interceptor → call refreshToken() → retry once → on second 401, clear auth state and redirect to /login
frontend_handling.403: Show inline 403 empty state component (not redirect)
frontend_handling.409_422: Extract error.message and show in form-level Alert above submit button
frontend_handling.400: Map details object to React Hook Form setError() calls for field-level display
frontend_handling.500: Show toast error with generic message; log error.request_id for support
frontend_handling.network_error: Show toast 'Connection lost. Check your network.' with retry button

admin.description: Full access to all features and settings. Can manage users and organization.

accountant.description: Full accounting access. Can post/void journal entries, manage invoices, bills, payments, reconcile. Cannot manage users.

bookkeeper.description: Day-to-day transaction entry. Can create/edit invoices, bills, expenses, payments, bank transactions. Cannot close periods, void posted entries, or manage settings.

manager.description: Approves expenses and bills. View-only access to reports and financials. Cannot create accounting entries.

viewer.description: Read-only access to all non-admin sections. Cannot create, edit, delete, or approve anything.

enforcement.api_layer: Middleware checks role from JWT claim before every handler. Returns 403 if insufficient. Applies org_id scoping on all queries.
enforcement.ui_layer: Use roleGuard(permission, userRole) from src/lib/roleGuard.ts. Wrap elements with conditional render.
enforcement.route_guard: AuthGuard component wraps all authenticated routes. Checks JWT validity + role. Redirects to /login or /dashboard.

ui_visibility_rules.description: Rules for showing/hiding UI elements based on role. Always enforce at API layer too — UI rules are UX only.
principles: Never rely solely on UI hiding for security — all actions require server-side permission check
Hide (not disable) nav items for modules user cannot access
Disable (not hide) buttons for actions user cannot perform within a page they can view
Show read-only data with a lock icon when user can view but not edit
Never show partial data — if user cannot view an entity, show 403 empty state for entire section

element_rules.sidebar_module_links: Render only if user.role in module.visible_to_roles
element_rules.primary_action_buttons: Render only if user has required permission key (e.g. 'invoices.create')
element_rules.edit_inline_controls: Disable if user lacks entity.edit permission; show tooltip 'Insufficient permissions'
element_rules.delete_buttons: Hidden (not disabled) if user lacks entity.delete permission
element_rules.post_void_buttons: Hidden if user lacks journal_entries.post or invoices.void etc.
element_rules.admin_nav_items: Visible only to admin role: Users, Organization, AuditLog
element_rules.status_badge_actions: Dropdown actions within StatusBadge filtered by permission matrix

ui_visibility_rules.react_pattern: Use usePermission(key: string) hook that reads user.role from authStore and checks permissions.matrix[key][role]

action_guards.description: Server-side guard rules applied per action beyond role permission — business state checks.

guards.guard: entry.status must be 'draft'; entry must be balanced (total_debit == total_credit); period must be open
entry.status must be 'posted'; period must be open or admin override
invoice.status must be 'draft' or 'sent'; customer must have email
payment must not have confirmed PaymentApplications (unapply first)
period must have no draft journal entries to lock; cannot unlock without admin role
difference must equal 0; all transactions must be matched or excluded
account must have no posted journal lines; no active child accounts
cannot delete own account; must be admin
expense.status must be 'submitted'; approver cannot be the submitter

action_guards.middleware_pattern: Express middleware guardAction(permKey, guardFn) — run after authMiddleware, before route handler

field_level_permissions.description: Fields that are conditionally readable or writable based on role.
field_level_permissions.implementation_note: Use class-transformer @Exclude() / @Expose() decorators on response DTOs for field filtering. Never filter in-place on entity objects.

permission_inheritance.description: How permissions compose — each higher role is a strict superset of the lower role.
rules: admin inherits ALL permissions from all roles below
accountant inherits all bookkeeper + manager permissions and adds post/void
bookkeeper inherits all manager permissions and adds create/edit
manager inherits all viewer permissions and adds limited actions (approve expense, apply payment)
viewer has read-only access to all non-admin modules
Permissions are additive within hierarchy — there is no permission negation
permission_inheritance.custom_roles: Not supported in V1 — role set is fixed. Planned for V2 via custom_roles table.
permission_inheritance.multi_org: A user's role is org-scoped — same person can be admin in Org A and viewer in Org B

super_admin.description: Platform-level super_admin for Anthropic/internal support access. Different from org admin role.
capabilities: Read any org's data (audit-only, no mutations)
Impersonate any org_admin user (creates an AuditLog entry)
Unlock locked financial periods with justification
Hard-delete soft-deleted records outside retention window
super_admin.storage: super_admin flag on User model, separate from role enum — never exposed to org-level APIs
super_admin.audit: Every super_admin action creates an AuditLog entry with actor_type='super_admin'
super_admin.access_control: Enforced via separate isSuperAdmin middleware, never via role-based matrix

state_management.url_state: React Router useSearchParams — filters, sort, page, tab, view_mode

create.description: After a successful create mutation, invalidate the entity list and dashboard stats

update.description: After a successful update mutation, invalidate the entity detail and list. Apply optimistic update for immediate UI feedback.
update.optimistic_strategy: Update the item in list cache immediately. Rollback to previous value on error.

delete.description: After a successful delete mutation, remove item from list cache and update counts. Soft delete — item is not permanently removed.
delete.optimistic_strategy: Remove item from list cache immediately. Re-add on error.

post_journal_entry.description: Posting a journal entry is a special mutation. After success, invalidate entry, list, accounts (balances change), and dashboard.

void_entry.description: Voiding a journal entry creates a reversing entry. Invalidate both.

record_payment.description: Recording a payment updates the linked invoice or bill balance_due and status.

close_period.description: Closing a financial period locks all transactions in it. Invalidate broadly.

complete_reconciliation.description: Completing reconciliation locks cleared transactions and updates bank account balance.

react_query_config.notes: Override stale_time per-query via query options. Financial periods and tax rates use 300000 (5min). Dashboard uses 60000 (1min). Reports use 300000 (5min). Notifications unread count uses 30000 (30s).

react_query_client_setup.instantiation: export const queryClient = new QueryClient({ defaultOptions: { queries: { staleTime: 30_000, gcTime: 300_000, refetchOnWindowFocus: false, refetchOnReconnect: true, retry: 2, retryDelay: attemptIndex => Math.min(1000 * 2 ** attemptIndex, 30_000) }, mutations: { onError: (error) => toast.error(getErrorMessage(error)) } } })
react_query_client_setup.provider: Wrap <App /> with <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>. Add <ReactQueryDevtools /> in development only.
react_query_client_setup.devtools: import { ReactQueryDevtools } from '@tanstack/react-query-devtools'. Render as last child of QueryClientProvider. Show only in development.
react_query_client_setup.invalidation_strategy: After every successful mutation, call queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [entity, orgId] }) to refetch list. For nested resources (e.g. invoice lines after payment), also invalidate parent (invoice). See mutation_rules for per-entity mapping.
react_query_client_setup.prefetch_on_hover: On DataTable row hover, call queryClient.prefetchQuery({ queryKey: [entity, id] }) to warm detail cache before navigation.
react_query_client_setup.error_handling: React Query mutation onError calls toast.error(getErrorMessage(error)). Queries wrap 401 in interceptor — no React Query-level error handling needed for auth. 409 Conflict errors trigger a refresh of the stale resource then prompt user.

zustand_config.setup: import { create } from 'zustand'; import { devtools, persist } from 'zustand/middleware'; import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer'
zustand_config.immer_note: Use immer middleware to allow direct state mutation in actions. Immer produces immutable updates under the hood.
zustand_config.persist_note: Only persist UI preferences and auth tokens to localStorage. Never persist sensitive financial data or server state — that lives in React Query cache.

actions.setAuth: (user: IUser, org: IOrganization, token: string) => void

authStore.persist: false — access token must NOT be persisted to localStorage
authStore.hydration: On app mount dispatch GET /api/auth/me; on success call setAuth(); on failure call clearAuth() + redirect to /login

state_shape.description: Keyed by entity name e.g. filters['invoices'] = { status, date_from, date_to, customer_id, q, page, sort_by, sort_dir }

actions.setFilter: (entity: string, key: string, value: unknown) => void

filterStore.persist: false — filters live in URL via useSearchParams

state_shape.description: Tracks which form IDs have unsaved changes

actions.initSession: (sessionId: string, bankAccountId: string, statementBalance: number) => void

optimistic_update_pattern.description: Used for mutations that update a single field and should feel instant. Pattern: cancel outgoing queries → snapshot cache → mutate cache → on error restore snapshot + show toast → on settle invalidate.
used_for: Toggle is_active on account/tax rate/bank account
not_used_for: Financial mutations (create invoice, post journal entry) — these always wait for server confirmation

error_handling.toast_library: Sonner (sonner npm package). Import toast from 'sonner'. Render <Toaster /> in AppShell.

toast_patterns.promise: toast.promise(mutateAsync(data), { loading: 'Saving...', success: 'Saved', error: 'Failed to save' })

error_handling.getErrorMessage: export function getErrorMessage(error: unknown): string { if (axios.isAxiosError(error)) return error.response?.data?.error ?? error.message; if (error instanceof Error) return error.message; return 'An unexpected error occurred'; }
error_handling.409_conflict: On 409, show toast.error('Record was updated by someone else. Refreshing...') then invalidate the resource query to force refetch.
error_handling.422_validation: React Hook Form + Zod handles client-side. Server 422 returns { error, details: Record<string, string[]> }. Map details to form.setError() calls using field name as key.
error_handling.network_error: React Query retries 2x with exponential backoff. After all retries exhausted, show ErrorBoundary fallback with Retry button.
error_handling.403_forbidden: Show inline PermissionDenied component with role requirement hint. Do NOT redirect.

cache_invalidation_map.description: Defines which query keys must be invalidated after each mutation. Used by React Query's queryClient.invalidateQueries.
cache_invalidation_map.implementation: Call queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [key] }) for each key in the relevant list from within useMutation.onSuccess or onSettled

optimistic_rollback_strategy.description: How to handle React Query optimistic updates rolling back on error.

pattern.step_1_onMutate: Cancel outgoing refetches for affected query keys. Snapshot current cache. Apply optimistic update.
pattern.step_2_onError: Restore snapshot via queryClient.setQueryData. Show toast error.
pattern.step_3_onSettled: Invalidate affected query keys regardless of success/failure (ensures consistency).

optimistic_rollback_strategy.code_template: See optimistic_update_pattern in this section for full template.
entities_with_optimistic_updates: Line item add/remove in draft invoices and bills
entities_without_optimistic_updates: Journal entry post/void (financial integrity — wait for server confirmation)
Payment creation (affects multiple entities — too complex to optimistically update all)
Any mutation that triggers a server-side balance recalculation

real_time_sync.description: WebSocket-based real-time state synchronisation for collaborative multi-user scenarios.

rooms.org:{org_id}: All users in org receive entity lifecycle events (created, updated, deleted, status changed)

event_handling.on_entity_event: Invalidate corresponding React Query keys from cache_invalidation_map
event_handling.on_notification: Increment uiStore.unreadNotificationCount; show Toast for high-priority events
event_handling.on_disconnect: Set wsStore.connected=false; show subtle 'Reconnecting...' banner; auto-reconnect with exponential backoff
event_handling.on_reconnect: Set wsStore.connected=true; call queryClient.invalidateQueries for all active queries to refetch missed updates

conflict_resolution.stale_overwrite_detection: Compare incoming event entity.version against cached entity.version. If cached is newer, ignore event — local optimistic update takes precedence until settled.

real_time_sync.connection_lifecycle: Connect on login. Join org:{org_id} and user:{user_id} rooms immediately. Disconnect on logout or session expiry.

offline_strategy.description: Application behaviour when network is unavailable.
offline_strategy.scope: Read-only offline support — mutations are blocked when offline.
offline_strategy.detection: navigator.onLine event + fetch error detection in axios interceptor → set uiStore.isOffline=true
ui_behaviour: Show persistent banner: 'You are offline. Data may be out of date.'
Disable all mutation buttons (create, edit, delete, post, void) with tooltip 'Not available offline'
Continue serving stale React Query cache — do not clear cache on offline
Queue no mutations — do not implement offline mutation queue in V1
offline_strategy.reconnect_behaviour: On navigator.online event, hide banner, re-enable UI, call queryClient.invalidateQueries() to refresh all stale data
offline_strategy.service_worker: Not implemented in V1. Consider for V2 if PWA is required.

pagination_state.description: How pagination state is stored and synchronised with URL.
pagination_state.strategy: URL search params for all list page pagination (enables share/bookmark/back-navigation)
pagination_state.zustand_for: Filter panel open/close state, selected rows for bulk actions (not persisted to URL)
pagination_state.reset_on_filter_change: When any filter changes, reset page to 1

react_query_integration.query_key: Include { page, page_size, sort, order, ...filters } in query key array so each page is independently cached
react_query_integration.prefetch_next_page: On page render, prefetch page+1 if total_pages > page (use queryClient.prefetchQuery)

events.active_page_effect: Prepend to bell list. Animate bell. Show in-app toast 5s.
Update invoice status badge. Toast 'Invoice sent'.
Invalidate invoices/bills list. Update balance_due. Toast.
If BankingPage open: refresh transactions list. Toast 'N transactions imported'.
If ReconciliationPage open: update difference display.
Refresh financial periods list. Show locked badge on affected period. Toast.
Update status badge. Invalidate account balances.

flows.name: Create and Send Invoice

steps.name: Open Invoice Form
steps.frontend: Navigate to /invoices/new

steps.name: Fill Header
steps.frontend: Form validation on blur

steps.name: Add Line Items
steps.frontend: Compute line_total = quantity * unit_price. Compute tax. Show running subtotal, tax_total, total.

steps.name: Save Draft
steps.frontend: Submit form. Show loading on button.
steps.backend: POST /invoices with lines via PUT /invoices/:id/lines

steps.name: Review Invoice
steps.frontend: Show invoice detail with all totals, status=draft

steps.name: Send Invoice
steps.frontend: Confirm dialog. On confirm: call useSendInvoice.
steps.backend: POST /invoices/:id/send. Email customer if email configured.

side_effects: email sent to customer.email via SendGrid

cross_entity_updates: Customer.outstanding_balance += invoice.total when status changes to sent
Attachment linked if file uploaded during creation
preconditions: At least one revenue Account exists
postconditions: Journal entry created if auto-post enabled

error_paths.resolution: Prompt user to add email before Send or allow Save as Draft
Show period picker with only open periods; block submission if none open
Validation error: at least one line must have unit_price > 0

rollback_steps: If journal entry auto-creation fails, rollback invoice to draft and show error

flows.name: Receive Payment on Invoice

steps.name: Open Payment Form
steps.trigger: User clicks Record Payment on invoice
steps.frontend: Open SlideOverForm pre-filled with invoice_id, customer_id, balance_due as amount

steps.name: Fill Payment Details
steps.trigger: User fills date, method, amount, bank_account
steps.frontend: Validate amount <= balance_due

steps.name: Submit
steps.frontend: Call useCreatePayment
steps.backend: POST /payments. Update invoice.balance_due. Update invoice.status → paid if balance_due = 0 else partial. Post journal entry: DR bank, CR accounts_receivable.

steps.name: Confirmation
steps.frontend: Close SlideOver. Toast 'Payment recorded'. Update balance_due display on invoice.

cross_entity_updates: Invoice.status → partial if balance_due > 0, → paid if balance_due == 0
preconditions: Invoice exists with status in sent|partial|overdue
postconditions: Bank account balance updated if bank_account_id provided

error_paths.resolution: Warn user; allow overpayment as unapplied credit
Allow — payment still recorded without bank linkage

rollback_steps: If PaymentApplication fails after Payment created, delete Payment and return error

flows.name: Create Bill and Record Payment

steps.name: Create Bill
steps.frontend: Navigate to /bills/new. Pre-fill vendor default_expense_account_id.

steps.name: Add Line Items
steps.frontend: Compute totals. Show subtotal, tax, total.

steps.name: Save Bill
steps.frontend: Submit form.
steps.backend: POST /bills. PUT /bills/:id/lines. Post journal entry: DR expense_account, CR accounts_payable.

steps.name: Approve Bill
steps.trigger: Manager or Accountant clicks Approve (if approval required)
steps.frontend: Call useApproveBill. Status → approved.
steps.backend: POST /bills/:id/approve

steps.name: Pay Bill
steps.frontend: SlideOverForm pre-filled with bill_id, vendor_id, balance_due.
steps.backend: POST /payments. Update bill.balance_due. Post journal entry: DR accounts_payable, CR bank.

postconditions: Bank account balance updated if bank_account_id provided

error_paths.resolution: Allow overpayment; create unapplied vendor credit
Allow payment against current open period even if bill period is locked

error_paths.condition: Vendor has no default expense account
error_paths.resolution: Require manual account selection on each bill line

rollback_steps: Bill creation and payment are separate mutations; if payment fails, bill remains in approved state for retry

flows.name: Record Expense

steps.name: Open Expense Form
steps.frontend: Open SlideOverForm

steps.name: Fill Expense Details
steps.trigger: User fills date, amount, account, vendor, method
steps.frontend: Form validation. Tax rate select.

steps.name: Upload Receipt
steps.frontend: ReceiptUploader. POST /attachments. Display thumbnail.
steps.backend: Upload to S3. Create Attachment record. Return attachment_id.

steps.name: Submit
steps.frontend: Call useCreateExpense
steps.backend: POST /expenses. Post journal entry: DR expense_account, CR bank or payable.

cross_entity_updates: Attachment.entity_id linked to expense.id after creation
postconditions: Expense created with status=draft or submitted

error_paths.resolution: Filter AccountSelector to expense accounts only; block manual entry
Block; show open periods only

rollback_steps: If attachment presign fails, still allow expense creation without attachment

flows.name: Post Journal Entry

steps.name: Create Entry
steps.frontend: Navigate to /journal-entries/new

steps.name: Add Lines
steps.trigger: User adds debit and credit lines via JournalLinesEditor
steps.frontend: Running debit/credit totals displayed. Show imbalance warning if not equal.

steps.name: Validate Balance
steps.frontend: If total_debit != total_credit: show red warning 'Entry is not balanced (difference: X)'. Disable Post button.

steps.name: Save Draft
steps.frontend: Call useCreateJournalEntry.
steps.backend: POST /journal-entries. PUT /journal-entries/:id/lines.

steps.name: Post Entry
steps.frontend: Confirm dialog. Call usePostJournalEntry.
steps.backend: POST /journal-entries/:id/post. Validate debits == credits. Validate period is open. Set status → posted. Update account balances.

cross_entity_updates: Account.current_balance updated for each line's account_id (+debit or -credit depending on account type)
postconditions: Period cannot be unlocked while posted entries exist

error_paths.resolution: Block post; show JournalBalanceIndicator with difference amount
Error 409; prompt to change period to an open one
Error 422: cannot post to inactive account

rollback_steps: Post is atomic; no partial rollback — either fully posts or returns error with no DB change

success_state.ui_change: Status badge updates to posted; Edit button disabled

failure_state.form_errors: Show reason inline above action buttons

flows.name: Bank Reconciliation

steps.name: Start Reconciliation
steps.frontend: Select bank account, enter statement end date and ending balance. Navigate to /reconciliation/:id.
steps.backend: POST /reconciliation-sessions

steps.name: Review Transactions
steps.frontend: Show two panels: uncleared transactions list (left) and statement summary (right).
steps.backend: GET /bank-transactions?bank_account_id=:id&reconciliation_status=unmatched

steps.name: Match Transactions
steps.frontend: Checkbox on each row. Update clearedTransactions in reconciliationStore. Recompute book_ending_balance and difference in real-time.
steps.backend: PATCH /bank-transactions/:id { reconciliation_status: 'cleared' } (optimistic)

steps.name: Resolve Difference
steps.frontend: Show difference prominently. If difference != 0: prevent completion. Guide user to find discrepancy.

steps.name: Complete
steps.trigger: User clicks Complete Reconciliation (enabled only when difference == 0)
steps.frontend: Confirm dialog. Call useCompleteReconciliation.
steps.backend: POST /reconciliation-sessions/:id/complete. Set status → completed. Lock all cleared transactions.

preconditions: BankAccount exists with bank transactions imported
No other in_progress reconciliation session for this account

error_paths.resolution: Block completion; show remaining difference with breakdown

error_paths.condition: Transaction already matched in prior session
error_paths.resolution: Prevent re-matching; show existing match tooltip
Show as suggestion only; require manual confirmation

rollback_steps: On session delete, revert all ReconciliationMatch records to unmatched and restore transaction statuses

flows.name: Close Financial Period

steps.name: Review Period
steps.trigger: Admin or Accountant opens financial period in Settings
steps.frontend: Show period detail with count of open draft entries.
steps.backend: GET /financial-periods/:id with stats

steps.name: Resolve Drafts
steps.frontend: Show list of open drafts with links. Prevent close until resolved.

steps.name: Close Period
steps.frontend: Confirm dialog: 'This action cannot be undone. All transactions in this period will be locked.' Call useClosePeriod.
steps.backend: POST /financial-periods/:id/close. Validate no draft entries. Set status → closed. All entries, invoices, bills in period become read-only.

steps.name: Post-Close Effects
steps.frontend: Status badge updates to closed/locked. Toast 'Period closed'. All edit actions on period records are hidden.

cross_entity_updates: All JournalEntry with period_id and status=draft → flagged with warning
BankTransaction unmatched within period date range → flagged
preconditions: No draft journal entries in period
postconditions: Period cannot be edited or re-opened without admin action

error_paths.resolution: Show list of draft entries; require user to post or void all before closing
Rollback entire close; period remains open; show error details

rollback_steps: close_financial_period job runs in single transaction — full rollback on any error

success_state.ui_change: Period badge shows locked; edit controls hidden

flows.name: Apply Payment to Invoice or Bill

steps.name: Open Payment Detail
steps.frontend: Load usePayment(id). Show payment amount, unapplied balance, existing applications. Unapplied balance = payment.amount - SUM(applications.amount_applied).
steps.backend: GET /payments/:id + GET /payments/:id/applications

steps.name: Open Apply Payment Form
steps.trigger: User clicks 'Apply to Invoice' or 'Apply to Bill' button. Button only visible when unapplied_balance > 0.
steps.frontend: Open SlideOverForm. Show entity_type select (Invoice/Bill), then async entity selector filtered by same customer/vendor and balance_due > 0. Pre-fill amount_applied with MIN(unapplied_balance, entity.balance_due).

steps.name: Submit Application
steps.frontend: Call useCreatePaymentApplication({ payment_id, entity_type, entity_id, amount_applied }).
steps.backend: POST /api/payment-applications. Validate: amount_applied <= unapplied balance; entity exists with balance_due >= amount_applied. Create PaymentApplication. Update entity.amount_paid += amount_applied, recalculate balance_due, update status (draft→partial or partial→paid). Create journal entry debit AR/AP, credit payment account.

steps.name: Remove Application
steps.trigger: User clicks Remove on an existing application row
steps.frontend: Confirm dialog: 'Remove this payment application? The invoice/bill balance will be restored.' On confirm, call useDeletePaymentApplication(id).
steps.backend: DELETE /api/payment-applications/:id. Reverse amount_applied from entity.amount_paid, recalculate balance_due and status. Reverse journal entry.

flows.journal_entry_side_effects: Debit Accounts Receivable (invoice) or Accounts Payable (bill); Credit Payment/Cash account.
postconditions: Invoice/Bill balance_due reduced; status updated to partial or paid

error_paths.resolution: Clamp to unapplied_amount; show warning
Allow overpayment; split into full pay + remaining credit

rollback_steps: PaymentApplication creation is atomic with balance recalculation

flows.name: Import Bank Transactions

steps.name: Select Bank Account
steps.trigger: User navigates to /banking/:id and clicks 'Import Transactions'
steps.frontend: Open SlideOverForm. Show file upload zone (CSV or OFX/QFX accepted up to 5MB). Show last imported date as hint.

steps.name: Upload and Parse
steps.frontend: Show parsing spinner. Preview first 5 rows in a table for confirmation. Highlight duplicates (same date + amount already imported) in amber.
steps.backend: POST /api/bank-transactions/import. Parse CSV/OFX server-side. Return preview: { rows_parsed, duplicates_skipped, rows_to_import } before committing.

steps.name: Confirm Import
steps.trigger: User reviews preview and clicks 'Import N transactions'
steps.frontend: Submit with confirm=true flag. Show progress toast.
steps.backend: Insert BankTransaction rows with reconciliation_status='unmatched'. Run auto-suggest matching algorithm: find payments, expenses, journal entries with matching amount ± 0.01 and date ± 3 days. Create ReconciliationMatch rows with match_type='auto_suggested', status='pending', confidence_score computed.

steps.name: Review Auto-Matches
steps.frontend: Redirect to bank account detail page. Auto-matched transactions shown with confidence badge. User can confirm or reject each suggestion.
steps.backend: PATCH /api/reconciliation-sessions/:sessionId/matches/:matchId { status: 'confirmed' | 'rejected' }

flows.journal_entry_side_effects: None on import. Journal entries created only when reconciliation match is confirmed.

error_paths.resolution: Show column mapping UI; highlight invalid rows
Skip silently; report count of duplicates skipped

rollback_steps: Batch import in transaction — rollback all on error

flows.name: Void Invoice

steps.name: Initiate Void
steps.trigger: User clicks 'Void Invoice' row_action or bulk_action. Only available when status IN ('draft','sent','overdue','partial').
steps.frontend: Open ConfirmDialog: 'Void invoice INV-0042? This cannot be undone. Any recorded payments will need to be re-applied.' Require reason input (min 10 chars).

steps.name: Process Void
